metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing the cc-enslaver discipline plugin.

plugins.name: cc-enslaver
plugins.description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.18 ships opt-in auto-GC on SessionStart (CC_ENSLAVER_AUTO_GC_DAYS=N) with 24h rate-limit marker; shares prune_old_sessions() with the manual /cc-enslaver:gc command; failing-open at every step.
